name: Colesville Towers
bathroomsNote: 2BR plans available in 1BA and 2BA configurations; 1BR plans are 1BA

notes.doorman: Multiple independent sources (RentCafe, PadMapper, Zumper, first-party search results) consistently state '24-hour attended front desk'; this is treated as Confirmed 24h
notes.inUnitLaundry: Multiple listing sources confirm on-site laundry center (common area) only; no source confirms in-unit washer/dryer; some aggregator snippets mention 'in-unit washer/dryer' but these appear to be erroneous auto-populated fields contradicted by all specific descriptions of the building
notes.balcony: RentCafe and multiple listing sources list 'large patio/balcony' as a unit-level amenity; described as a standard feature offering city and park views
notes.unitClimate: Residents have noted via apartmentratings.com that 'the AC is cut off too soon in the season' and that 'AC and pipes are old,' implying building-managed seasonal switching rather than fully individual control; however no source explicitly confirms building-controlled vs. individually controlled thermostats; marked Unclear
notes.wellMaintained: Mixed signals: some residents report prompt maintenance and well-kept grounds; others note slow response times and aging systems (AC/pipes described as old and noisy); overall apartmentratings.com rating is 4.3/5 stars from 385 reviews, maintenance sub-rating at 3.7/5; marked Unclear rather than committing to Yes or No
notes.petFriendly: Cats and dogs allowed, max 2 pets per unit; $250 deposit + $25/month per pet; breed restrictions apply (pit bulls, rottweilers, and similar breeds prohibited); some older sources stated dogs not allowed but current listings confirm dogs are permitted with restrictions
notes.packageRoom: Package service listed as a building amenity across multiple sources; some resident reviews praise concierge package handling though a few note occasional organizational issues
notes.has2BRor1BRDen: 2BR/1BA and 2BR/2BA floor plans confirmed; no 1BR+den plan identified in any source
notes.buildingDetails: Mid-rise apartment complex; 275 units; managed by ROSS Companies (Ross Management Services); utilities mostly included in rent; garage and street parking available; also features bike storage, billiards room, grilling areas, and his-and-hers saunas
